zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Everingham於1279年8月29日出生在英國越可爾黑波恩時，他的父親Robert de Everingham II23歲，母親Alice De La Hyde Lady19歲。他於1306年1月12日與Clarice de La Warre在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾內瓦爾可--特倫特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1341年5月8日在英國諾廷加姆爾素維爾享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉可頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Everingham于1279年8月29日出生在英国越可爾黑波恩时，他的父亲Robert de Everingham II23岁，母亲Alice De La Hyde Lady19岁。他于1306年1月12日与Clarice de La Warre在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾內瓦爾可--特倫特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1341年5月8日在英国諾廷加姆爾素維爾享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾拉可頓。

nameMeanings.name: Everingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): habitational name from Everingham (East Yorkshire), named in Old English Yferingaham ‘homestead (hām) of the people (-inga-) of Eofor’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Everingham was born on 29 August 1279, in Sherburn, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert de Everingham II, was 23 and his mother, Alice De La Hyde Lady, was 19. He married Clarice de La Warre on 12 January 1306, in Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 May 1341, in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Everingham est né le 29 août 1279, à Sherburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert d’Everingham II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice De La Hyde Lady, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Clarice de La Warre le 12 janvier 1306, à Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1341, à Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Everingham am 29. August 1279 in Sherburn, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Everingham II 23 und seine Mutter Alice De La Hyde Lady 19. Er hat am 12. Januar 1306 in Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Clarice de La Warre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Mai 1341 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Everingham è nato il il 29 agosto 1279 nel Sherburn, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Everingham II, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alice De La Hyde Lady, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Clarice de La Warre il 12 gennaio 1306, nel Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 maggio 1341, nel Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Everinghamが1279年8月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアシェルブルンで生まれた時，父Robert de Everingham IIは23歳，母Alice De La Hyde Ladyは19歳であった。1306年1月12日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアニューアルク-オン-トレントでClarice de La Warreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1341年5月8日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウスウエルで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Everingham(이)가 1279년 8월 29일 영국 요르크실르 셔번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Everingham II(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice De La Hyde Lady(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1306년 1월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 뉴아르k--트렌트에서 Clarice de La Warre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1341년 5월 8일 영국 노틴그함실르 소우스웰에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 라스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.29 August 1279–8 May 1341: 29 de agosto de 1279–8 de maio de 1341
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Everingham nasceu em 29 de agosto de 1279, em Sherburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Everingham II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice De La Hyde Lady, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Clarice de La Warre em 12 de janeiro de 1306, em Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de maio de 1341, em Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Everingham родился 29 августа 1279 г. в местности ширбурн, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Everingham II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice De La Hyde Lady, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Clarice de La Warre 12 января 1306 г. в местности нюарк-он-трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 мая 1341 г. в местности соутвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности лакстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.29 August 1279–8 May 1341: 29 de agosto de 1279–8 de mayo de 1341
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Everingham nació el 29 de agosto de 1279, en Sherburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Everingham II, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice De La Hyde Lady, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Clarice de La Warre el 12 de enero de 1306, en Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de mayo de 1341, en Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
